shortDescription: Spacious 3-bedroom detached home on a quiet street in Don Mills with mature trees and a private backyard.
fullDescription: Welcome to 1101 Leslie Street in the vibrant Don Mills neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. The sleeping quarters comprise 3 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
